final_verdict.is_brian_inventory_truly_thin_or_hidden: The candidate inventory is not thin: Brian has hundreds of generated candidates. The public/rendered inventory is thin because confirmed-container and lead-time/course/container filters hide most candidates, then presentation compacts adjacent starts from 14 public Brian candidates to 5 rendered offers.
final_verdict.single_biggest_cause: Confirmed-container/public sellable filtering plus missing container/course enablement removes most generated Brian candidates; lead-time is also large in the integrity audit, but current public sellable output shows only 14 container-supported Brian offers.
final_verdict.safest_next_fix: Add an audit-only course/container coverage matrix for Brian HSI/AHA target courses, then selectively add or confirm appointment container/course mappings for high-value Brian courses before changing filters or rendering.
what_not_to_touch_yet: presentation compaction logic until container/course coverage is understood
